input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

reference_csv.description: Path to reference organisms CSV samplesheet.
reference_csv.help_text: A CSV file listing reference genomes to spike into background datasets. Must contain 'id', 'accession', and 'path' columns. Provide exactly one of 'accession' or 'path' for each reference row.

dataset_csv.description: Path to background datasets CSV samplesheet.
dataset_csv.help_text: A CSV file listing metagenomic background datasets. Must contain 'id', 'layout', 'accession', 'reads_1', and 'reads_2' columns. Set layout to 'single' or 'paired'. Provide exactly one source per row: an SRA accession, a single-end reads_1 path, or paired-end reads_1 and reads_2 paths.

publish_dir_mode.help_text: Nextflow publishDir mode. Use 'copy' to copy files, 'symlink' for symbolic links, etc.

store_options.title: Store options
store_options.description: Directories for caching downloaded reference genomes and datasets.

reference_dir.description: Directory to store downloaded reference genomes.
reference_dir.help_text: Downloaded reference FASTA files are saved here for reuse across pipeline runs.

dataset_dir.description: Directory to store downloaded dataset FASTQ files.
dataset_dir.help_text: Downloaded FASTQ files are saved here for reuse across pipeline runs.

simulation_design_options.title: Simulation design options
simulation_design_options.description: Parameters controlling the simulation experiment design.

coverages.description: List of target spike-in coverage depths to simulate.
coverages.help_text: Each reference genome will be spiked into each background dataset at each of these coverage levels.

downsample_background.description: Whether to downsample background datasets before spiking.

dataset_coverage.description: Target read count for background dataset downsampling.
dataset_coverage.help_text: Number of reads to retain from background datasets. Supports suffixed values like '10k' (10,000 reads).

badread_per_segment.description: Run Badread independently for each FASTA record before concatenating segment reads.
badread_per_segment.help_text: Useful for segmented references where every segment should be represented. Changes low-coverage semantics because Badread crosses the target independently for each FASTA record.

badread_low_coverage_cutoff.description: Coverage threshold at or below which Badread uses badread_low_coverage_length.

badread_low_coverage_length.description: Badread length distribution to use for coverages at or below badread_low_coverage_cutoff.

badread_qscore_model.description: Badread quality score model to use.

badread_junk_reads.description: Percentage of junk reads in Badread output.

badread_random_reads.description: Percentage of random reads in Badread output.

badread_chimeras.description: Percentage of chimeric reads in Badread output.

wgsim_indel_fraction.description: Fraction of mutations that are indels in wgsim.
